description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-radio-group

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-radio-group/`
**Sub-components:** hx-radio
**wc-mcp Health Score:** radio-group=89 (B), radio=95 (A)
**Known issues:** radio-group: formAssociated, _internals, _groupEl, _hasErrorSlot, _groupId, _helpTextId, _errorId, _handleRadioSelect, _handleKeydown missing. radio: _inputId missing.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Radio circle, checked indicator, label, error. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. radiogroup role. Radio button ARIA pattern. Arrow key navigation within group. Required. Error.
3. **Functionality** — Group value. Individual radio values. Form integration. Validation. Horizontal/vertical layout. Error/help text.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated. ElementInternals. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Custom radio indicator. CSS Parts. Layout.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all missing descriptions (9 + 1).
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Selection. Arrow keys. Form. Validation.
8. **Storybook** — Vertical/horizontal. Required. Error. Disabled items.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Radios form element. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-radio-group
